title: BEM-921 worker review
objective:
Create file governance/audit/internal/results/BEM921_WORKER_SYSTEM_WORKING_PROTOCOL_V2_REVIEW.md with content # BEM-921 WORKER SYSTEM WORKING PROTOCOL V2 REVIEW
Status: WORKER_REVIEW_READY
Decision: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES
Findings:
- The new version must be a full-system protocol, not Telegram-only.
- Operator corrections are coherent and must replace the simplified internal-contour algorithm in previous drafts.
- Internal contour algorithm must be represented as an iterative state machine with proposal audit and result audit.
- Curators are roles/elements of objects, not contour members by default. Curator constraints come from role + object + channel rules.
- Analyst/Auditor/Executor are contour elements. Their constraints come from role + object + contour + contour workspace.
- Workspace belongs to internal contour. Main workspace is repository main code/state.
- Vertical communication is curator-to-curator. Horizontal communication inside object is verified data exchange between auditor and analyst.
- GitHub Actions/runners/event_log/proof must be part of execution mechanics, not background notes.
- Claude 13 requirements remain mandatory acceptance criteria.
- The prompt section must include actual prompt drafts/templates, not only file names.
Recommended protocol title:
- BEM-921 System Working Protocol v2: Full Evolution Roadmap and Prompt Architecture.
Recommended roadmap:
- BEM-920 Elements/contours SSOT and component inventory.
- BEM-921 Proof hardening and non-null release SHA.
- BEM-922 Telegram input schema and General Director routing.
- BEM-923 Operator production gate.
- BEM-924 Dispatch lifecycle and auto-trigger.
- BEM-925 Object and contour execution lifecycle with deterministic DoD.
- BEM-926 Managed channel consumer, event log and canonical reporting.
- BEM-927 E2E mock/production split.
- BEM-928 Claude re-audit package.
Prompt acceptance:
- Existing prompts must be listed and either accepted or marked for canonization.
- New prompt templates must be included for curator, analyst, auditor, executor.
- New contour prompts must describe properties, fixed_task/workspace and constraints, not local element rules.
Status recommendation:
- SYSTEM_WORKING_PROTOCOL_V2_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS.
No issue comments.
